data.label: Introduction to Python
data.description: Learn what Python is, its features, and why it's popular. Install Python and set up your development environment.

data.label: Python Basics
data.description: Understand variables, data types, operators, and basic input/output operations.

data.label: Control Flow
data.description: Learn about conditional statements (if-else) and loops (for, while).

data.label: Functions
data.description: Understand how to define and call functions, parameters, return values, and scope.

data.label: Data Structures
data.description: Learn lists, tuples, dictionaries, and sets with their common operations.

data.label: Modules and Packages
data.description: Understand how to import and use modules, and explore the Python Standard Library.

data.label: File Handling
data.description: Learn to read from and write to files in Python.

data.label: Error Handling
data.description: Understand exceptions, try-except blocks, and raising exceptions.

data.label: Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
data.description: Learn classes, objects, inheritance, polymorphism, and encapsulation.

data.label: Practice Exercises
data.description: Apply your knowledge with beginner-friendly coding exercises and small projects.

data.label: Python Community
data.description: Join Python communities, forums, and attend local meetups to learn and network.

data.label: Version Control with Git
data.description: Learn Git basics to manage your Python projects and collaborate with others.

data.label: Debugging Tools
data.description: Explore Python debugging tools like pdb and IDE debuggers to troubleshoot code.

data.label: Next Steps
data.description: Explore web development (Flask/Django), data science (Pandas, NumPy), or automation scripts.
